old_thesis: High valuation (market cap $328B) raises concerns about sustainability; business model fragility due to reliance on government contracts and potential slowdown in AI adoption growth.
new_thesis: Palantir is becoming a mission-critical AI operating system with 85% revenue growth, Rule of 40 at 145%, and booming U.S. commercial demand (+120% growth). It is compared to AI infrastructure giants like NVIDIA.
what_changed: 最近一季度（2026-03-31）EPS超预期17.9%；营收低于预期9.8%；管理层给出4条前瞻指引，显示业务走向；公司类型已确认为HyperGrowth，估值方法已切换至EV/Revenue + Revenue Growth + FCF Margin
why_now: 股价仍低于分析师共识目标价17.4%，下次财报（2026-08-03）是预期差验证的关键节点。
